title: You See All

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Where are You in these darkest hours?
When shadows lengthen and evil towers
Above the weak, the poor, the lost
While wicked men ignore the cost

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: They boast of greed and selfish gain
Believing justice calls in vain
Their hearts are stone, their words are thorns
While innocence in silence mourns

sections.label: Chorus
lines: The proud declare,
"No God exists"
Their schemes like poison in their fists
But You see all, You mark each deed
And hear the cries of those in need

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Rise up, O Lord, lift up Your hand
Remember those throughout the land
Who cry for hope in bitter night
Their trust in You their only light

sections.label: Chorus
lines: The proud declare,
"No God exists"
Their schemes like poison in their fists
But You see all, You mark each deed
And hear the cries of those in need

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Break now the arm of wickedness
Defend the orphan in distress
Until no mortal dares to stand
Against the justice of Your hand

sections.label: Bridge
lines: For You are King through endless days
The nations fade before Your gaze
The humble find their strength renewed
Their hearts with courage are endued

sections.label: Final Chorus
lines: The proud declare,
"No God exists"
Their schemes like poison in their fists
But You see all, You mark each deed
And hear the cries of those in need

sections.label: Outro
lines: O Lord our Rock, our Shield, our Tower
Now is the day, now is the hour
To show Your might, to make things right
And lead us from our darkest night

epigraph: The wicked in his pride doth persecute the poor
